request_payload.exposure_text: As a mom and grandma, I've always believed in being prepared. My neighbor Sarah, a retired nurse, told me how local emergency drills saved lives during last year's power outage. Why shouldn't we have the same protections nationwide? It's not about fear, it's about responsible preparedness. #CommunitySafety #PreparedNotScared
